items.situation: student telling a librarian they cannot find a reserved book
items.speaker: I've looked everywhere for that reserved textbook.

options.A: Let me look into that for you.
options.B: The reading room is on the third floor.
options.C: The printers are out of paper again.
options.D: Yes, you can reserve a study room.

items.explanation: 正确答案是A。图书管理员用一句习惯性的帮助用语'Let me look into that for you'主动帮学生查找，回应了'找不到书'的诉求，属于idiomatic。B是semantic_association_trap，由'textbook'联想到'reading room/floor'，答非所问。C是off_topic，谈打印机缺纸，与找书无关。D是misinterpretation，把'reserved（预留的书）'误解成'预约自习室'。
items.A: Let me look into that for you.

items.situation: student asking a professor about an assignment deadline
items.speaker: Why's this essay due so early?

options.A: The essay should be about five pages.
options.B: Would an extension actually help you?
options.C: The library closes at nine tonight.
options.D: You're welcome to rewrite it later.

items.explanation: 正确答案是B。教授没有直接解释原因，而是用反问'Would an extension actually help you?'把对话推进到解决方案，属于counter_question。A是semantic_association_trap，由'essay'联想到页数，答错了方面。C是off_topic，谈图书馆关门时间。D是misinterpretation，提到可以重写，没有回应'为什么这么早截止'。
items.B: Would an extension actually help you?

items.situation: acknowledging a friend's schedule conflict and proposing another time
items.speaker: What time's good for you then?

options.A: It's already half past three now.
options.B: She really enjoyed the concert last night.
options.C: How about sometime early next week?
options.D: The meeting room was fully booked.

items.explanation: 正确答案是C。对方问什么时间方便，C用反问'How about sometime early next week?'提出具体替代时段，推进了安排，属于counter_question。A是misinterpretation，抓住'time'去报当前时刻。B是off_topic，谈别人看演唱会。D是off_topic，谈会议室被订满，与约时间无关。
items.C: How about sometime early next week?

items.situation: student asking whether the campus shuttle stops near the dorms
items.speaker: Does the shuttle stop near the dorms?

options.A: The shuttle got a new paint job.
options.B: Parking permits went up in price.
options.D: Hop on, I'm heading that way.

items.explanation: 正确答案是D。对方没有正面回答是否停靠，而是用口语化的'Hop on, I'm heading that way'直接解决了学生的出行需求，属于idiomatic。A是semantic_association_trap，由'shuttle'联想到重新喷漆。B是off_topic，谈停车证涨价。C是wrong_question_type，回答的是'多久一班'而非'是否在宿舍附近停'。
items.D: Hop on, I'm heading that way.

items.situation: two classmates discussing how much time is left before a deadline
items.speaker: How much time's left before Friday?

options.A: We've got about three days left.
options.B: The cafeteria changed its menu today.
options.C: The project room smells like fresh paint.
options.D: Yes, we're allowed to work together.

items.explanation: 正确答案是A。对方问离周五还有多少时间，A直接给出'about three days left'，属于direct_topical。B是off_topic，谈食堂换菜单。C是semantic_association_trap，由'project'联想到项目室的油漆味。D是wrong_question_type，用是/否回答了'能否一起做'，答非所问。
items.A: We've got about three days left.

items.situation: asking a passerby for directions to the nearest pharmacy
items.speaker: I'm trying to find the nearest pharmacy.

options.A: The weather turned quite cold this afternoon.
options.B: Actually, it's just around the corner.
options.C: That pharmacy hired several new workers.
options.D: Yes, it opens at eight tomorrow.

items.explanation: 正确答案是B。对方在找最近的药店，B以话语标记'Actually'开头，间接指路'just around the corner'，属于marker_led_indirect。A是off_topic，谈天气变冷。C是semantic_association_trap，由'pharmacy'联想到药店招人。D是wrong_question_type，回答的是'几点开门'而非'在哪里'。
items.B: Actually, it's just around the corner.

items.situation: student checking with a TA about lab report requirements
items.speaker: Do we need to include raw data?

options.A: The data lab closes at six.
options.B: The printer ran out of toner.
options.C: I'll email you the full template.
options.D: Section three was really quite difficult this week.

items.explanation: 正确答案是C。助教没有正面回答是否要附原始数据，而是用'I'll email you the full template'从根本上解决问题——模板里已写明要求，属于context_shift。A是semantic_association_trap，由'data'联想到数据实验室的关门时间。B是off_topic，谈打印机没墨。D是off_topic，谈第三部分很难，与报告要求无关。
items.C: I'll email you the full template.

items.situation: student asking where to sign up for a course
items.speaker: Where do I sign up for chemistry?

options.A: Chemistry is required for every science major.
options.B: The bookstore is having a big sale.
options.C: Enrollment opens first thing on Monday.
options.D: Right this way, I'll show you.

items.explanation: 正确答案是D。对方问在哪里报名，D用习惯用语'Right this way, I'll show you'带对方过去，直接解决问题，属于idiomatic。A是semantic_association_trap，由'chemistry'联想到它是必修课。B是off_topic，谈书店打折。C是wrong_question_type，回答的是'什么时候开放选课'而非'在哪里报名'。
items.D: Right this way, I'll show you.

items.situation: classmates coordinating when the study group meets
items.speaker: When's the study group usually meeting?

options.A: The study lounge got new chairs.
options.B: Are you free this Thursday evening?
options.C: My roommate adopted a small kitten.
options.D: I haven't met the new tutor yet.

items.explanation: 正确答案是B。对方问学习小组通常什么时候聚，B用反问'Are you free this Thursday evening?'把安排往前推进，属于counter_question。A是semantic_association_trap，由'study group'联想到自习室换了新椅子。C是off_topic，谈室友养猫。D是misinterpretation，把'meet（聚会）'误当成'见到（某人）'。
items.B: Are you free this Thursday evening?

items.situation: declining an evening invitation and suggesting another time
items.speaker: I'm not sure I can make it tonight.

options.A: Maybe we can reschedule for the weekend.
options.B: The bus was late yet again this morning.
options.C: I'll make you a sandwich instead.
options.D: Yes, the tickets were fairly expensive.

items.explanation: 正确答案是A。对方表示今晚可能来不了，A以标记词'Maybe'开头，间接提出'reschedule for the weekend'，属于marker_led_indirect。B是off_topic，谈公交又迟到。C是misinterpretation，抓住'make it'里的'make'去说做三明治。D是off_topic，谈门票贵，与是否赴约无关。
items.A: Maybe we can reschedule for the weekend.
